user_query: My brother and I inherited our parents' farm when dad died in 2021. We subdivided it into 6 lots - kept the farmhouse lot and sold the other 5 as rural residential blocks. The farm was our parents' home since 1992. How is CGT calculated when we've subdivided inherited property?

scenario_info.name: Subdivision - Inherited Farmland Subdivided and Sold
scenario_info.description: My brother and I inherited our parents' farm when dad died in 2021. We subdivided it into 6 lots - kept the farmhouse lot and sold the other 5 as rural residential blocks. The farm was our parents' home since 1992. How is CGT calculated when we've subdivided inherited property?
